zh.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton是Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion和Joan Herbert的女兒，於1383年9月11日出生在英國英格蘭。她和Robert Morton Sr.至少有3個兒子。她去世於大約1424年在英國享年42歲。

zh-hans.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton是Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion和Joan Herbert的女儿，于1383年9月11日出生在英国英格兰。她和Robert Morton Sr.至少有3个儿子。她去世于大约1424年在英国享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kniveton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kniveton (Derbys) or Kneeton (Notts).

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

en.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton was born on 11 September 1383, in England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion and Joan Herbert. She had at least 3 sons with Robert Morton Sr.. She died about 1424, in England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton est née le 11 septembre 1383, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion et Joan Herbert. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Robert Morton Sr.. Elle est décédée environ 1424, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton wurde am 11. September 1383 in England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion und Joan Herbert geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert Morton Sr. mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb um 1424 im Alter von 42 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton è nata il il 11 settembre 1383 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion e Joan Herbert. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Robert Morton Sr.. Morì circa 1424, nel England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイア
ja.Bawtry, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアバウトリー
ja.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアメルカストン
ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Knivetonは1383年9月11日にイギリスイギリスでSir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of MercastionとJoan Herbertの娘として生まれた。彼女はRobert Morton Sr.との間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1424年にイギリスで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton(은)는 1383년 9월 11일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion(와)과 Joan Herbert의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert Morton Sr.(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1424년 영국에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton nasceu em 11 de setembro de 1383, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion e Joan Herbert. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Robert Morton Sr.. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1424, em Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton родилась 11 сентября 1383 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion и Joan Herbert. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Robert Morton Sr. Она умерла около 1424 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

sm.from 1399 to 1412: mai le 1399 e o'o I le 1412

es.lifeSummary: Cicely Kniveton nació el 11 de septiembre de 1383, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion y Joan Herbert. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Robert Morton Sr.. Murió aproximadamente 1424, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
